title: stevia ranunculoides
intro: Stevia ranunculoides, also known as the paraguayan sweetleaf, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to South America, particularly Paraguay. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, and its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stevia ranunculoides include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve oral health, and act as a natural sweetener due to its high steviol glycoside content. Herbal preparations of Stevia ranunculoides include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
